name: Zombie Survival Escape
description: Your mission is to run and escape to the helicopter while eliminating all zombies, utilizing bombs and grenades. You can change your weapon and gain money to purchase grenades and bombs. Additionally, you can buy new weapons by collecting more money from the ground. Website Developer <a href='https://www.insanegamesonline.com/'>https://www.insanegamesonline.com/</a>
instructions: WASD Walk B Change Gun N Fire M Knife
tags: 2D, Mentolatux, Shooting, survival, Unity3D, WebGL, Zombie
